securityNote: Sanitized starter ledger only. Do not store secrets, tokens, database URLs, cookies, runtime state, or exact credentials here.

workflowOwners: Maxink packages tasks, verifies Codex output, and manages PR/handoff.
Codex executes small scoped task packages in the repo.
Hermes receives durable handoff summaries and longer-term orchestration context when needed.

nextHandoff.recommendedAction: Review the Codex loop package, then use docs/codex/task-template.md for the next local Codex task. Maxink verifies output before Hermes receives any durable summary.
